MBSF Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions Segment Codebook │ August 2025 │ V 1.7 35 

INTDIS_MEDICARE_EVER 

LABEL: Intellectual Disabilities and Related Conditions First Ever Occurrence Date — Medicare Only Claims 

DESCRIPTION: This variable shows the date when the beneficiary first met the criteria for the intellectual disabilities 
and related conditions indicator. The variable will be blank for beneficiaries that have
